user.title: Metlink Explorer Setup
user.description: Enter your Metlink Open Data API key to get started. Optionally add your own AISStream API key to enable live ferry tracking.

transportation_type.title: Select Transportation Type
transportation_type.description: Choose the type of transport you want to monitor. Only transportation types with available routes are shown. At the bottom, you can optionally enter your own API keys to overwrite the currently stored keys for this setup. Enable `Save API keys only` if you want to update keys without adding a route.

route_selection.title: Select Route
route_selection.description: Choose the specific route you want to monitor.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your key and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Metlink API. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.no_routes_found: No routes found for the selected transportation type.
error.no_routes_available: No available routes for the selected transportation type. All routes may already be configured.
error.no_transportation_types_available: No transportation types with available routes found. All routes may already be configured.

abort.route_added_to_existing: Route added to existing transportation integration.

init.title: Metlink Explorer Options
init.description: Configure options for your Metlink Explorer integration. Enter new API keys only when you want to overwrite stored values; leaving key fields blank keeps existing saved keys.

data.ais_vessel_map: Ferry Vessel Map (one per line: MMSI,NAME)
